searchContext.projectName: Confidential Client - Senior Engineering Team Expansion
searchContext.companyContext: Series B fintech company building payment infrastructure
searchContext.teamStage: Growth phase; engineering team expanding from 15 to 25
searchContext.hiringBrief: Find senior engineers with experience in scalable payment systems and financial compliance
searchContext.objective: Evaluate multiple candidates for technical competency, cultural fit, and growth potential
searchContext.searchReason: Team expansion to support product growth and regulatory compliance requirements
searchContext.successProfile: Within 6 months, contribute to core payment processing systems and mentor junior engineers
searchContext.successMetrics: Successful integration of payment features, improved code quality metrics, mentoring outcomes
searchContext.stakeholderBrief: CTO values system design skills; Engineering Manager focuses on team dynamics

candidates.name: Alice Johnson
candidates.summary: Principal engineer at Stripe with 8+ years in payment systems
candidates.experience: Led development of fraud detection systems at Stripe, previously at PayPal
highlights: Architected fraud detection system processing $10B+ annually
Led team of 8 engineers during high-growth period
Published papers on secure payment protocols
concerns: May expect higher compensation than budget allows
Large company experience may not suit startup pace
candidates.interviewerNotes: Strong technical background, potential cultural fit concerns

candidates.name: Bob Chen
candidates.summary: Senior engineer at Capital One with banking technology expertise
candidates.experience: 7 years in banking tech, focus on compliance and risk systems
concerns: Limited experience with high-volume consumer payments
May prefer corporate stability over startup growth
candidates.interviewerNotes: Excellent compliance background, needs assessment on innovation mindset

candidates.name: Carol Davis
